title: Clipboard & Snipping Tool
subtitle: Copy, Paste & Capture Screens Easily!
overview: This session helps students understand how to use Clipboard tools and the Snipping Tool in Windows for copying, cutting, pasting, and capturing screenshots effectively.

images._note: Add screenshots and classroom activity photos from the actual session.

activity.title: Copy-Paste & Screenshot Practice Activity
steps: Use Ctrl+C to copy the text
Use Ctrl+V to paste it below
Use Ctrl+X to cut one line
Capture a screenshot of the document
Save the screenshot in Pictures folder
Challenge: Take screenshot of desktop and paste into Paint

quiz.explanation: Ctrl + C is used to COPY selected text or files.
Ctrl + V is used to PASTE copied or cut items.
Clipboard temporarily stores copied or cut text, files, and images.

quiz.q: Which shortcut is used for CUT?
quiz.explanation: Ctrl + X removes selected content and stores it in Clipboard.

quiz.q: What is the Snipping Tool used for?
quiz.explanation: Snipping Tool is used to capture screenshots in Windows.

quiz.q: Which type of snip captures the whole screen?
quiz.explanation: Full-screen Snip captures the entire screen.

quiz.q: Which shortcut is used for PASTE?
quiz.explanation: Ctrl + V pastes copied or cut content.

quiz.q: What happens when you CUT a file?
options: It moves to Clipboard for pasting elsewhere
quiz.explanation: Cut removes the item from its original place and stores it in Clipboard.

quiz.q: Which application can be used to paste screenshots for drawing?
quiz.explanation: Paint allows students to paste and edit screenshots.
Keyboard shortcuts help users work faster and efficiently.

quiz.q: Which tool helps capture only a selected area of screen?
quiz.explanation: Snipping Tool can capture selected screen areas.

quiz.q: Where are copied items stored temporarily?
quiz.explanation: Clipboard stores copied and cut items temporarily.

quiz.q: What is the full form of GUI?
Which key is commonly used with Ctrl for copying?
quiz.explanation: Ctrl + C is the shortcut for Copy.
